ValidationRule.description: Prevents skipping stages in the Opportunity pipeline. Stages must progress sequentially: Qualified‚ÜíProposal‚ÜíDemo‚ÜíNegotiation‚ÜíQuote Acceptance‚ÜíFunds (Negotiation)‚ÜíAdvance Paid‚ÜíClosed Won. Closed Lost is allowed from any stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(StageName), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Lost')), NOT($Profile.Name = 'System Administrator'), OR( AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Qualified'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Proposal'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Proposal'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Demo'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Demo'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Negotiation'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Negotiation'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Quote Acceptance'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Quote Acceptance'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Funds (Negotiation)'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Funds (Negotiation)'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Advance Paid'))), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), 'Advance Paid'), NOT(ISPICKVAL(StageName, 'Closed Won'))) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Stages must progress sequentially: Qualified ‚Üí Proposal ‚Üí Demo ‚Üí Negotiation ‚Üí Quote Acceptance ‚Üí Funds (Negotiation) ‚Üí Advance Paid ‚Üí Closed Won. You cannot skip stages.
